title: Informed Consent for Research Participation

sections.heading: Purpose of the Study
sections.text: You are invited to participate in a research study evaluating the effectiveness of two different types of video summaries (transcript-only versus multimodal). The goal is to understand which summary format better supports student learning and review of lecture content.

sections.heading: Procedures
sections.text: If you agree to participate, you will be asked to: (1) review video segments from selected courses, (2) compare two versions of summaries for each segment, and (3) rate each summary on four dimensions (faithfulness, completeness, coherence, and usefulness) using a 1-10 scale. The study should take approximately 30-45 minutes per session.

sections.heading: Risks and Discomforts
sections.text: There are no anticipated risks beyond those of normal computer use. You may experience minor eye strain or fatigue from screen time, similar to typical study activities.

sections.heading: Benefits
sections.text: Your participation will help improve educational technology and contribute to research on automated video summarization. While you may not directly benefit from this study, your responses will help future students access better learning materials.

sections.heading: Confidentiality and Data Privacy
sections.text: Your responses are anonymous. Only your chosen username is stored — no email, name, or personal identifiers are required. All data is stored on a secure server and used only for research purposes. Aggregated results may be published in academic venues.

sections.heading: Voluntary Participation
sections.text: Your participation is entirely voluntary. You may withdraw at any time without penalty by simply closing the browser. You may also skip any question you prefer not to answer.

sections.heading: Contact Information
sections.text: If you have questions about this study, please contact [PI Name] at [email@example.com]. For questions about your rights as a research participant, contact the IRB at [IRB contact].

agreement_label: I have read and understood the information above. I voluntarily agree to participate in this study.
